title: uprmputs
text: uprmputs Fill a basic parameter or entity field with Uniface-formatted data. Explain this code long uprmputs (UHACT hParam, UCHAR pData); Copy Parameters hParam The handle to the basic parameter or entity field pData The Uniface-formatted data to put into the parameter or field Return Values For more information, see the "Call-In API Return Codes" topic. Use Library: ucall Description uprmputs fills a basic parameter or entity field with Uniface-formatted data. Use this function if the parameter or field has a non-standard data type that is not supported by one of the standard functions ustr2uf , uint2uf , and so forth. No conversion from external to Uniface format takes place during this call; the data must already be formatted the way Uniface expects it. Example: uprmgets and uprmputs The following code uses uprmgets and uprmputs to pass output parameter data from one operation to the input parameter of another operation. The operations OP1 and OP2 are both located in the service TESTSVC, and are defined as follows: Explain this code operation op1 params string msg : inout; endparams msg = "the quick brow fox jumps over the lazy dog" end operation op2 params string msg : in; endparams putmess msg end Copy Below is the 3GL code. Note that we could have used the detach/attach mechanism here, but then the program would not have had access to the Uniface-formatted data. Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> void get_and_put2 () { UHACT hEnv, hIn; /* Environment and instance handle */ UHACT hOp1, hOp2; /* Operation handles for OP1 amd OP2 */ long actStatus, procErr; /* Activation status and procerr */ UCHAR* pMsg; /* Pointer to string parameter data */ UHACT hPrm1, hPrm2; /* Parameter handles */ ueopen(&hEnv); /* Get environment handle */ uinstnew (hEnv, (UCHAR *)"TESTSVC", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn, &procErr);/* Instantiate service TESTSVC*/ uinstopr (hIn, (UCHAR *)"OP1", 0, &hOp1); /* Instantiate operation OP1 */ uinstopr (hIn, (UCHAR *)"OP2", 0, &hOp2); /* Instantiate operation OP1 */ uopract (hOp1, &actStatus, &procErr);/* Activate operation OP1 */ uprmgeth(hOp1, 1, 0, &hPrm1); /* Get OP1 param handle */ uprmgets(hPrm1, &pMsg); /* Get Uniface-formatted data from OP1*/ uprmgeth(hOp2, 1, 0, &hPrm2); /* Get OP2 param handle */ uprmputs(hPrm2, pMsg); /* Put Uniface-formatted data into OP1*/ uopract (hOp2, &actStatus, &procErr); /* Activate operation OP2 */ uinstdel (hIn, 0); /* Destroy instance */ unifree (hOp1, pMsg); /* Free the string data */ ufreeh (&hOp1); /* Free OP1 operation handle */ ufreeh (&hOp2); /* Free OP2 operation handle */ ufreeh (&hPrm1); /* Free OP1 parameter handle */ ufreeh (&hPrm2); /* Free OP2 parameter handle */ ufreeh (&hIn); /* Free instance handle */ ufreeh (&hEnv); /* Free environment handle */ } Copy Related Links Call-In API Return Codes Codes that can possibly be returned by functions from the 3GL call-in API are consistent with the values returned by the ProcScript function $procerror, unless noted otherwise. uint2uf Copy the specified integer value to a basic parameter or entity field. uprmgets Return Uniface-formatted data from a basic parameter or entity field. ustr2uf Copy string data from a program buffer to a basic parameter or entity field.
